metadata.title: GPT Image 2
metadata.description: GPT Image 2 is the most advanced AI image generation model — fewer prompts, better results. Powerful intent understanding and composition for both text-to-image and image editing.
metadata.keywords: gpt image 2, ai image generator, text to image, image editing, ai image model

multi_generator.title: AI Generator
multi_generator.description: Create images, videos, and music in one place. Pick a mode, pick a model, hit generate.
